fixes.origin:
stmt = f"SELECT id, balance FROM accounts WHERE name = '{account_name}'"
records = db_cursor.execute(stmt).fetchall()
fixes.replacement:
stmt = "SELECT id, balance FROM accounts WHERE name = ?"
records = db_cursor.execute(stmt, (account_name,)).fetchall()

static_findings.message: Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "stmt" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
static_findings.evidence: stmt = f"SELECT id, balance FROM accounts WHERE name = '{account_name}'"
